arts.ttl: Coventry City drop major next manager deal hint as press conference confirmed
arts.sum: Carr has been in interim charge of the Sky Blues since club owner Doug King sacked Mark Robins on November 7. Get the latest Coventry City news sent straight to your phone by joining our Sky Blues WhatsApp group.

arts.ttl: Mark Robins gets in touch as form book dismissed for Coventry City vs Sheffield United
arts.sum: As well as looking for a new manager, Coventry City also face the challenge of playing Championship high-fliers Sheffield United on Saturday (12.30pm kick-off). Get the latest Coventry City news sent straight to your phone by joining our Sky Blues WhatsApp group.
